references.hebrew: וְאִ֗ישׁ כִּֽי־יַקְרִ֤יב זֶֽבַח־שְׁלָמִים֙ לַיהֹוָ֔ה לְפַלֵּא־נֶ֙דֶר֙ א֣וֹ לִנְדָבָ֔ה בַּבָּקָ֖ר א֣וֹ בַצֹּ֑אן תָּמִ֤ים יִֽהְיֶה֙ לְרָצ֔וֹן כׇּל־מ֖וּם לֹ֥א יִהְיֶה־בּֽוֹ׃
references.english: And when anyone offers, from the herd or the flock, a sacrifice of well-being to GOD for an explicitcexplicit Or “unspecified” or “extraordinary”; meaning of Heb. lephalle uncertain. vow or as a freewill offering, it must, to be acceptable, be without blemish; there must be no defect in it.

commentary_links.hebrew: כׇּל־הַמִּנְחָ֗ה אֲשֶׁ֤ר תַּקְרִ֙יבוּ֙ לַיהֹוָ֔ה לֹ֥א תֵעָשֶׂ֖ה חָמֵ֑ץ כִּ֤י כׇל־שְׂאֹר֙ וְכׇל־דְּבַ֔שׁ לֹֽא־תַקְטִ֧ירוּ מִמֶּ֛נּוּ אִשֶּׁ֖ה לַֽיהֹוָֽה׃
commentary_links.english: No grain offering that you offer to G<small>OD</small> shall be made with leaven, for no leaven or honey may be turned into smoke as an offering by fire to G<small>OD</small>.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: תעשה חמץ ו לא תאפה חמץ &star במסרס אחר

commentary_links.hebrew: לֹ֤א תֵאָפֶה֙ חָמֵ֔ץ חֶלְקָ֛ם נָתַ֥תִּי אֹתָ֖הּ מֵאִשָּׁ֑י קֹ֤דֶשׁ קׇֽדָשִׁים֙ הִ֔וא כַּחַטָּ֖את וְכָאָשָֽׁם׃
commentary_links.english: It shall not be baked with leaven; I have given it as their portion from My offerings by fire; it is most holy, like the purgation offering and the reparation offering.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: תעשה חמץ ו לא תאפה חמץ &star במסרס אחר

commentary_links.hebrew: וּמָע֤וּךְ וְכָתוּת֙ וְנָת֣וּק וְכָר֔וּת לֹ֥א תַקְרִ֖יבוּ לַֽיהֹוָ֑ה וּֽבְאַרְצְכֶ֖ם לֹ֥א תַעֲשֽׂוּ׃
commentary_links.english: You shall not offer to GOD anything [with its testes] bruised or crushed or torn or cut. You shall have no such practicesdpractices I.e., mutilations. in your own land,
commentary_links.matched_snippet: מסרס שהוא חייב דכתיב ומעוך וכתות
